texts.MyERP:10002: Actual end date cannot be before actual start date.
texts.MyERP:10003: All required materials have already been requested or transferred.
texts.MyERP:05002: Insufficient stock for {itemId} in warehouse {warehouseId}. Requested: {requested}, Available: {available}. Enable 'Allow Negative Stock' on the item to proceed.

texts.MyERP:02009: Payment over-allocation. Outstanding amount ({outstanding}) is less than the allocated amount ({allocatedAmount}).
texts.MyERP:01001: Invalid status transition. The document is not in the required status for this action.
texts.MyERP:04004: Supplier '{supplierName}' is on hold ({holdType}). Transaction cannot proceed.
texts.MyERP:04005: Item '{itemName}' has a minimum order quantity of {minQty}. Ordered quantity ({orderedQty}) is below minimum.
texts.MyERP:02010: Invoice '{invoiceNumber}' has no outstanding amount to write off.

texts.MyERP:05010: Quality Inspection was rejected for items: {items} on {referenceType}.
texts.BudgetExceededMessage: Budget exceeded for account '{account}': budget {budget}, spent {spent}, requested {requested}.
texts.MyERP:08001: Return items must have negative quantity. Item '{item}' has positive qty.
texts.MyERP:08002: Return document must reference the original invoice.
texts.MyERP:08003: Return exchange rate ({actual}) must match original document rate ({expected}).
texts.MyERP:08004: Return quantity ({returnQty}) exceeds original quantity ({maxQty}) for item '{item}'.
texts.WriteOffConfirmation: Are you sure you want to write off the outstanding balance? This action cannot be undone.
texts.MyERP:01006: Opening invoices cannot update stock. Opening balances are accounting-only entries.
texts.MyERP:01007: Document must have at least one item.
texts.MyERP:01008: Amount must be greater than zero.
texts.SubscriptionNotActive: Subscription is not active. Cannot generate invoices for inactive subscriptions.
texts.SubscriptionHasNoPlans: Subscription has no plans. Add at least one plan before generating invoices.

texts.MyERP:12002: Subscription has no plans configured. Please add at least one billing plan.
texts.NoSalarySlipsYet: No salary slips found. Run payroll to generate slips.

texts.MyERP:13001: Circular dependency detected: task '{taskId}' would create a dependency loop.

texts.MyERP:13003: Percent Complete must be between 0 and 100. Got: {value}.
texts.MyERP:14001: Insufficient leave balance for '{leaveType}': requested {requested} days but only {available} days available.
texts.MyERP:14002: Cannot delete this leave allocation — {used} days have already been used.

texts.NoLeaveAllocationsYet: No leave allocations yet. Use Bulk Allocate to assign leave to all employees.
texts.InsufficientLeaveBalance: Insufficient leave balance. {leaveType}: requested {requested} days, available {available} days.
texts.CannotDeleteUsedAllocation: Cannot delete allocation with {used} days already used.
texts.OpeningEntriesBalanced: Opening entries are balanced. Ready for production.
texts.OpeningJEDescription: Create Balance Sheet opening entries. P&L accounts are not allowed.
texts.OpeningInvoicesDescription: Import outstanding receivables and payables from legacy system.
texts.OpeningInvoiceHelp: Use opening invoices to migrate customer/supplier outstanding balances. Each invoice creates an AR/AP entry without stock impact.
texts.MyERP:02031: Only Balance Sheet accounts allowed for opening entries. Account '{accountName}' is of type '{rootType}'.
texts.MyERP:02032: Group accounts cannot be used in journal entries. Please select a leaf account: '{accountName}'.
texts.MyERP:02033: No Temporary Opening account configured for company '{company}'. Please create an Equity account with sub-type 'Temporary Opening'.
texts.NoPeriodClosingVouchersYet: No period closing vouchers yet. Create one to close a fiscal year.
texts.MyERP:05015: Stock Entry type '{entryType}' requires {field} on all items.
texts.MyERP:05016: Source and target warehouse cannot be the same (warehouse: {warehouse}). Use inventory dimensions to differentiate.
texts.QuotationExpired: Quotation has expired and has been marked as Lost.
texts.MyERP:04006: Supplier '{supplierName}' is blocked from receiving Purchase Orders due to supplier scorecard standing.
texts.MyERP:04007: Supplier '{supplierName}' is blocked from receiving RFQs/Supplier Quotations due to supplier scorecard standing.
texts.MyERP:10008: Insufficient raw material for production: item {itemId} requires {required} units but only {available} available in warehouse.
texts.MyERP:02011: Cannot close fiscal year '{currentFiscalYear}' — prior fiscal year '{priorFiscalYear}' must be closed first.
texts.MyERP:01010: Cannot cancel {documentType} — it has submitted {dependent} documents. Cancel the dependent documents first.
texts.MyERP:02021: Duplicate payment reference: {referenceType} {referenceId} appears more than once
texts.MyERP:04011: Posting date {postingDate} is before Purchase Order {poNumber} date {poDate}. Cannot receive/invoice before the order was placed.
texts.MyERP:04012: Cannot create purchase return — submitted assets exist on the original document {returnAgainst}. Cancel the assets first.
texts.MyERP:04013: Row {row}: Source warehouse and target warehouse cannot be the same.
texts.MyERP:04014: Row {row}: Cannot set source warehouse on subcontracted purchase documents.
texts.MyERP:02022: Bank transaction currency ({transactionCurrency}) does not match bank account currency ({bankAccountCurrency}).
texts.MyERP:02023: Excluded fee ({fee}) is bigger than the deposit ({deposit}) it is deducted from.

texts.MyERP:02025: Included fee ({fee}) is bigger than the withdrawal ({withdrawal}) itself.
texts.MyERP:02026: Mandatory accounting dimension '{dimension}' is not set on GL line #{lineIndex}.

texts.MyERP:02003: Account is a group account and cannot receive direct postings.

texts.MyERP:05001: Unsupported entity type for this operation.
